first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the reasoning is substantively the same across both evaluations. The model consistently identifies the same non-negotiable missing qualifications (C for embedded systems, Linux kernel experience, Japanese language) as the reason for the low score, regardless of whether the candidate's work history is international or US-based. The minor differences in phrasing are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run noise.
